claim_bullets.bullet_text: The function *zip* composes two or more iterables into an iterable by mapping over the iterables and yielding arrays of values (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.285-286).
Note: zip is also the following special case of zipWith (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.285-286).
The const zip = callFirst(zipWith, (...values) => values) expresses zip as a special case of zipWith (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.285-286).

source_record_text: This section describes functions that compose two or more iterables into an iterable, specifically zip and zipWith.
